metadata.description: Shadow mode test dataset: 40 Slack messages from a simulated 200-person SaaS company over one week. Messages have already passed the prefilter — they all scored above the 0.35 authority score threshold. Eric's pipeline should classify each message and extract structured fields.

messages.text: I'll have the API spec ready by Friday. Will share it as a Notion doc.
On it

thread_context.text: Can someone take the auth migration? It needs to be done by Wednesday.

messages.text: I should be able to get the onboarding flow updated sometime next week
After discussing with the team, we're going API-first. Mobile app is deferred to Q4. @alice @bob @carol were all in alignment on this.

thread_context.text: We need to decide: API-first or mobile-first? Both have tradeoffs.
API-first gives us more flexibility long term. Mobile can wrap the API later.
Agreed. Mobile-first locks us into a specific UX too early.

messages.text: sure lol
sure lol

thread_context.text: @dave can you review the PR for the auth changes before EOD?

messages.text: I will never understand this codebase
thanks for handling that @alice, the deploy looks clean
I'll definitely get the database migration done before the sprint ends on Thursday
yeah I can probably look into the caching issue sometime this sprint
@alice.lee can you put together the technical architecture doc for the new auth system? We need it before the board meeting next Tuesday.
lmao we should probably fix our CI pipeline too while we're at it
I'll push the fix to staging this afternoon and run the regression suite. If it passes, I'll merge to main before 5pm.
The new dashboard mockups are almost done, I just need to finish the mobile responsive views. Probably tomorrow.
Let's go with Redis. I've benchmarked it against Memcached and it's 3x faster for our access patterns. @bob @dave — any objections?

thread_context.text: We need to decide on the caching strategy before proceeding.

messages.text: blocked on the design review, waiting for @grace.wong to finish the mockups
I can take that on. Give me until end of next sprint to scope it and put together a proposal.

thread_context.text: We need someone to own the logging infrastructure overhaul.

messages.text: fyi the monitoring dashboard is updated with the new metrics. Let me know if anything looks off.
Going forward, all customer-facing changes need a product review before shipping. No exceptions. @marcus.rivera @carol.chen please make sure your teams know.
I think we should consider moving to a microservices architecture at some point, it would solve a lot of our scaling issues
I'll refactor the payment module to use the new API client by end of week
yep

thread_context.text: @bob can you have the prototype ready for the user testing session on Monday?

messages.text: I've set up the new staging environment. Credentials are in 1Password under 'Staging v2'. Let me know if anyone has access issues.
After the retro, we agreed to switch to two-week sprints starting next month. @marcus approved. @alice @bob @dave @eve will adjust their planning accordingly.
Here are the three options for the new landing page. Let me know which direction feels right and I'll polish it up by Thursday.
I might be able to look at the data pipeline issue but honestly I'm pretty swamped right now

thread_context.text: The ETL pipeline has been flaky for two weeks. Someone needs to dig into it.

messages.text: Done. PR is up: #347. @frank can you take a look?

thread_context.text: I'll definitely get the database migration done before the sprint ends on Thursday

messages.text: Will review it this afternoon, should have comments by 3pm

thread_context.text: I'll definitely get the database migration done before the sprint ends on Thursday
Done. PR is up: #347. @frank can you take a look?

messages.text: who wants coffee? I'm doing a run
We need to deprecate the v1 API by end of Q2. @alice will own the migration guide, @dave will handle the sunset notifications, and @carol will communicate to customers.
tried the new component library, not sure it's the right fit. Going to stick with our custom stuff for now.
I'll rotate the API keys tonight during the maintenance window and update 1Password by morning
lol yeah that's never going to happen

thread_context.text: do you think we could rewrite the entire backend in Rust by next quarter?

messages.text: Just wrapped up the user flow diagrams. Uploading to Figma now. @carol take a look when you get a chance.
Sounds good, I'll sync with @dave tomorrow morning to align on the endpoint naming conventions

thread_context.text: Make sure the new API endpoints follow the naming convention we discussed.

messages.text: We should think about adding SSO at some point. Several enterprise prospects have asked about it.
I'll take the Elasticsearch migration. Should have the mapping done by Wednesday and the data sync running by Friday.

thread_context.text: We need to move search from Postgres full-text to Elasticsearch. Who can own this?

messages.text: We've decided to raise a Series A in Q3. @marcus will lead the technical narrative, @carol will own the metrics deck. Target: $8-12M at $40-60M post.
heads up: AWS is showing elevated latency in us-east-1. Monitoring but no action needed yet.
k I'll do it after lunch

thread_context.text: @dave the test suite is failing on the payments module. Can you investigate?
